Taurus: These native have big face. They like company of women
whose age is considerably less than their own age. They are usua41y of
sacrificing and forgiving nature and are capab~ of enduring hardships
and physical sufferings.
The occupations Qoverned by Taurus are agriculture related,
cement, property, luxury goods. furs. cosmetics and jewel trade,
bankers. btol<ers. cashiers. gamblers, gardeners. nursery owners, musk.
actors, those connected with entertainment and amusement Industry,
tailors, revenue officials etc. They also deal In flowers, milk, land ~ any
manner, sugar. cotton and similar professions.
